waiver_info: Result-based waiver (Bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (Semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Play quota, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota, And many more.
eligibility: General Students: Having a minimum 2.5 GPA both in Secondary School Certificate (SSC) and Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) with minimum 'A' grade in Physics, Mathematics, Chemistry and English. For Diploma Holder: Students having minimum 2.5 GPA both in SSC and Diploma may apply for admission.
labs: Machine Learning and Expert System Lab
Image Processing and Pattern Recognition Lab
Software Engineering and Information Systems Lab
curriculum_highlights: Mathematics I: Calculus and Ordinary Differential Equations
Physics I: Mechanics, Waves, Oscillations and Optics, Basic DC Theory
Mathematics II: Complex Variables, Linear Algebra and Matrices
Art of Living and Engineering Ethics
contact: Admission Helpline: +880 961 790 1212, admission@daffodiluniversity.edu.bd, www.daffodiluniversity.edu.bd / daffodiluniversity.edu.bd, Daffodil Smart City, Birulia, Savar, Dhaka 1216
intake: Spring: Jan-Apr | Summer: May-Aug | Fall: Sep-Dec
